name: Dry AK-high flop, BB vs BTN SRP
description: Single-raised pot, dry broadway-heavy board. Narrow ranges on both sides (6 hero vs 8 villain combos) to keep the reference output easy to eyeball against TexasSolver. Classic c-bet study spot: hero has a ton of equity with AA/KK/AKs/AKo but has to balance checks with JJ/QQ.

input.hero_range: AA, KK, AKs, AKo, QQ, JJ

expected_notes: Populated by differential run; this is the golden slot that the convergence suite is first calibrated against.
